description:

This role will accelerate your growth in distributed systems, cloud platform engineering, and large\\-scale data infrastructure.
   

  

 Successful candidates will have experience in one or more of these areas: designing and coding cloud\\-scale SaaS products; building data lakes or data engineering tools; working with big data technologies such as Spark, Kafka, Hadoop, or HBase; enterprise software development in C\\#, Scala, Java, or Python; and working with the Azure stack (Storage, Compute, Networking, Fabric, Purview, Synapse, AKS, DevOps, Data Factory, Power BI).

title: Software Development Engineer, Backend
description:
**Overview Of The Company**
 Fox Corporation
   

  

 Under the FOX banner, we produce and distribute content through some of the world’s leading and most valued brands, including: FOX News Media, FOX Sports, FOX Entertainment, FOX Television Stations and Tubi Media Group. We empower a diverse range of creators to imagine and develop culturally significant content, while building an organization that thrives on creative ideas, operational expertise and strategic thinking.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Fox Corporation is home to industry\\-leading brands including FOX News Media, FOX Sports, FOX Entertainment, FOX Television Stations, Tubi Media Group, and FOX One, our recently launched direct\\-to\\-consumer (DTC) platform.
   

  

 Across our portfolio, we build and operate large\\-scale digital platforms that serve millions of users globally. Our teams combine innovative technology, deep data insights, and world\\-class content to deliver highly personalized, reliable, and scalable consumer experiences across web, mobile, and connected TV platforms.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Software Engineer in the Backend/API team, you will be responsible for building and operating scalable, resilient backend systems that power multiple consumer\\-facing platforms. You will work on high\\-throughput, low\\-latency services and APIs that are critical to core product experiences.
   

  

 This role requires engineers who take end\\-to\\-end ownership \\- from understanding the problem and designing systems to implementing, deploying, and operating them in production. We are looking for strong backend engineers who can work independently, make sound technical decisions, and deliver reliable systems without the need for constant hand\\-holding.
   

  

**A Snapshot Of Your Responsibilities**
* Design, build, and operate backend services and APIs that run at high scale with strict reliability and performance requirements.
* Take complete ownership of assigned problem areas, from requirements understanding and system design to production rollout and ongoing operations.
* Perform high\\-level and low\\-level system design, clearly articulating trade\\-offs and architectural decisions.
* Write high\\-quality, maintainable, and well\\-tested code across backend components.
* Build and evolve distributed systems that are resilient, fault\\-tolerant, and observable in production.
* Optimize existing systems for performance, latency, scalability, and cost.
* Apply strong problem\\-solving skills and data structures knowledge to design efficient, real\\-world solutions.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to deliver backend capabilities that support evolving product needs.
* Participate actively in code and design reviews, maintaining high engineering standards.
* Continuously improve system reliability, developer productivity, and engineering best practices within the team.


**What Will You Need**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related technical field.
* 3\\-6 years of experience building backend software systems in production environments.
* Strong programming skills in one or more backend languages, preferably Golang.
* Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and their application in backend and distributed systems.
* Experience designing and building distributed systems with a focus on scalability, availability, and reliability.
* Hands\\-on experience working with cloud\\-based systems (e.g., AWS or equivalent).
* Experience working with databases and data stores (relational and/or NoSQL) and an understanding of data modeling and performance trade\\-offs.
* Practical understanding of modern AI systems, including large language models (LLMs), and how to integrate AI capabilities into backend software.
* Familiarity with using AI to build, enhance, or operate software systems (e.g., LLM\\-based APIs, prompt\\-driven workflows, automation, developer productivity).
* Ability to work independently, take ownership, and deliver systems end\\-to\\-end with minimal guidance.


*We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories consistent with applicable law.*

title: Software Engineering Manager, Play Ads
description:

* 8 years of experience in software development.
* 3 years of experience with full\\-stack development, across back\\-end such as Java, Python, Golang, or C\\+\\+ codebases, and front\\-end experience including JavaScript or TypeScript, HTML, CSS or equivalent.
* 3 years of experience in a technical leadership role.
* 2 years of experience in a people management or team leadership role.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience in Android mobile application development, server\\-side applications for mobile clients.
* Experience in Java, Kotlin, SQL.


**About the job** 
 Like Google's own ambitions, the work of a Software Engineer goes beyond just Search. Software Engineering Managers have not only the technical expertise to take on and provide technical leadership to major projects, but also manage a team of Engineers. You not only optimize your own code but make sure Engineers are able to optimize theirs. As a Software Engineering Manager you manage your project goals, contribute to product strategy and help develop your team. Teams work all across the company, in areas such as information retrieval, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, distributed computing, large\\-scale system design, networking, security, data compression, user interface design; the list goes on and is growing every day. Operating with scale and speed, our exceptional software engineers are just getting started \\-\\- and as a manager, you guide the way.
   

  

 With technical and leadership expertise, you manage engineers across multiple teams and locations, a large product budget and oversee the deployment of large\\-scale projects across multiple sites internationally.
   

  

 In this role, you will be a part of Play Ads, an impactful, fast\\-growing part of the Play Store organization dedicated to serving relevant and compelling ad experiences to users. You will have a direct impact on Google's revenue as an engineer in this role, taking on the exciting challenge of scaling their solutions to billions of worldwide users.Google Play offers music, movies, books, apps and games for devices, powered by the cloud. It syncs across devices and on the web. As part of the Android and Mobile team, Googlers working on Google Play do everything from engineering our back\\-end systems, to shaping product strategy, to forming great content partnerships. They make it possible for people to do things like buy an ebook or song on their Android phone, then have it instantly available on their laptop. The Google Play team enhances the Android ecosystem by giving developers and partners a premium store where they can reach millions of users.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Establish and communicate team priorities that align with the broader organization's goals, ensuring strategy, processes, and decision\\-making across teams.
* Define clear expectations for individuals based on their level and role and aligned to the broader organization's goals, while meeting regularly to discuss performance and development and provide feedback and coaching.
* Drive the mid\\-term technical goal and roadmap, stewarding the stability and quality of one of the most widely used smartphone applications in the world, Google's Play Store.
* Support the engineering team as they design and build new features, formats, infrastructure for serving ads on the Play Store, running AB experiments, measure and analyze the performance of the features built.
* Review code developed by other engineers and provide feedback to ensure best practices (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency).

title: Software Engineer III, Mobile (Android), Play Apps
description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages, or 1 year of experience with an advanced degree.
* 2 years of experience Android application development.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or a related technical field.
* 2 years of experience with performance, large\\-scale systems data analysis, visualization tools, or debugging.
* 2 years of experience with data structures and algorithms in either an academic or industry setting.
* Experience in code and system health, diagnosis and resolution, and software test engineering.
* Experience developing accessible technologies.
* Experience with low\\-level systems and Android UX.


**About the job** 
 Google's software engineers develop the next\\-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large\\-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast\\-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full\\-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
   

  

 With your technical expertise you will manage project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables. You will design, develop, test, deploy, maintain, and enhance software solutions.
   

  

 Google Play offers music, movies, books, apps and games for devices, powered by the cloud. It syncs across devices and on the web. As part of the Android and Mobile team, Googlers working on Google Play do everything from engineering our backend systems, to shaping product strategy, to forming great content partnerships. They make it possible for people to do things like buy an ebook or song on their Android phone, then have it instantly available on their laptop. The Google Play team enhances the Android ecosystem by giving developers and partners a premium store where they can reach millions of users.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Write product or system development code.
* Review code developed by other engineers and provide feedback to ensure best practices (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency).
* Contribute to existing documentation or educational content and adapt content based on product/program updates and user feedback.
* Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing the sources of issues and the impact on hardware, network, or service operations and quality.
* Participate in, or lead design reviews with peers and stakeholders to decide amongst available technologies.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: Web Developer
description:
**Company Description**
 Global University Systems is an international education group that empowers students to transform their lives through education. We believe education drives careers, lives, and society forward, enabling a brighter future for all. Our network of 30 institutions offers the broadest range of industry\\-relevant skills through inclusive, accessible, and digital\\-first learning. We currently educate around 122,000 students on campuses worldwide and have 20M\\+ unique subscribers to our courses. Our global ecosystem powers accessible digital learning and academic achievement.
   

  

**About Quallege**
 Quallege is an international student recruitment platform that partners with leading U.S. universities to drive enrollment from global markets. We operate at the intersection of higher education and international marketing — working on behalf of our university partners to attract, engage, and convert students across key regions
   

  

 Our work serves three primary audiences:
 **recruitment partners** 
 (the agents and agencies on the ground in each market),
 **prospective students** 
 (the end audience our campaigns are ultimately designed to reach), and
 **university partners** 
 (the institutions we represent, who are active stakeholders in approvals and brand standards). Understanding how to communicate effectively and appropriately for each audience is central to every role on our team.
   

  

 We are a global company with a local mindset. Some of our communications are market\\-specific — tailored in tone, cultural context, or language for a particular region — while others follow a global approach applied consistently across all markets. The ability to navigate both is key.
   

  

 Because we produce content on behalf of universities, our work must adhere to each institution's brand guidelines and is often subject to university approval workflows.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a capable and detail\\-oriented Web Developer to join Quallege’s marketing team. This is a hands\\-on production role focused on two core areas: HTML email development and campaign landing pages. This role is responsible for marketing\\-facing digital assets and ensuring our communications render correctly, track properly, and connect seamlessly with our CRM and marketing systems.
   

  

 You bring solid front\\-end fundamentals, a quality\\-first mindset, and the ability to work across multiple concurrent projects. You understand how websites, forms, and digital assets integrate with CRM platforms, and you can act as an informed liaison between the marketing team and our agency when technical decisions arise.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**HTML Email Production**
* Build responsive, cross\\-client HTML email templates from design files or briefs using Stripo (or equivalent), coded for compatibility with Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, mobile clients and others
* Maintain and update a modular email template library covering campaign types: partner onboarding sequences, university\\-specific announcements, event invitations, and newsletters.
* Proactive template development: Actively identify opportunities to templatize recurring email formats, spot inefficiencies in the current setup, and propose reusable structures before being asked.
* Yield\\-focused journeys — beyond onboarding, they'll build nurture sequences aimed at moving students further down the funnel (application submission, deposit payment, enrollment confirmation, etc.). These are behaviourally triggered or stage\\-based journeys, not just one\\-off sends.
* Apply inline CSS and table\\-based layouts following email\\-safe coding standards; conduct pre\\-send rendering QA across major clients and devices.
* Troubleshoot and resolve rendering issues, broken layouts, and display inconsistencies across clients and devices.
* Implement UTM parameters and ensure all links, tracking codes, and CTA elements are correctly configured before deployment.
* Coordinate with the Partner specialist, Copywriter and Design teams to receive brand assets (logos, imagery, fonts) and copy, then independently design and build production\\-ready email outputs within agreed timelines.


**Landing Pages \\& Web Assets**
* Build and maintain campaign landing pages using Landingi that are responsive, fast\\-loading, and optimized for conversion — using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as needed.
* Develop web assets including banners, event registration pages, partner\\-facing pages, and promotional components.
* Implement on\\-page SEO best practices (semantic HTML, meta tags, alt attributes, page speed considerations) in coordination with the Copywriter.
* Integrate forms, tracking pixels, and analytics tools (Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, or equivalent) into landing pages.


**CRM \\& Systems Integration**
* Ensure web forms, landing pages, and email assets are correctly integrated with Quallege’s CRM (Salesforce or equivalent), passing lead and engagement data accurately.
* Understand and implement UTM and conversion tracking flows so that digital touchpoints feed cleanly into marketing dashboards and attribution reporting.
* Collaborate with the marketing team and external agency to troubleshoot data flow issues between web properties and CRM systems.
* Support the setup and QA of marketing automation workflows that connect email, landing page, and CRM data — working within platforms such as HubSpot, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, or equivalent.


**UX/UI Design \\& Visual Execution**
* Independently design and build HTML emails and landing pages from brief or concept — owning the full process from visual layout and typography to final coded output, without relying on a separate designer.
* Apply UX/UI principles to produce digital assets that are visually polished, on\\-brand, intuitive, and optimized for the intended audience — balancing aesthetic quality with technical performance.
* Create design mockups or wireframes in Figma (or equivalent) when needed prior to development, and work within brand guidelines to maintain visual consistency across all digital touchpoints.
* Apply accessibility best practices (WCAG standards) and mobile\\-first design thinking to all email and landing page builds, ensuring outputs are functional and visually consistent across devices.


**Agency Liaison \\& Standards**
* Act as an informed internal point of contact between the marketing team and the external web agency — understanding technical scopes, reviewing deliverables, and communicating requirements clearly.
* Review and QA agency outputs for marketing\\-facing web changes, flagging issues and ensuring brand and functional consistency.
* Document email templates, landing page components, and integration configurations to build a reusable, maintainable asset library.
* Stay current on front\\-end development trends, email standards, and CRM integration best practices.


**Required**
**Qualifications \\& Education**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Web Development, Information Technology, or related field
* Equivalent professional experience considered in lieu of formal degree


**Desirable**
* Front\\-end or web development certification
* UX/UI design coursework or qualification (e.g., Google UX Design Certificate, Interaction Design Foundation)


**Essential**
**Experience \\& Skills**
* 3–5 years of professional front\\-end or web development experience
* Proven, hands\\-on experience building HTML email templates with inline CSS and table\\-based layouts, including cross\\-client QA
* Experience building and optimizing campaign landing pages for lead generation or conversion
* Strong command of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles
* Working knowledge of JavaScript; familiarity with jQuery and ES6
* Demonstrated understanding of CRM integration: connecting web forms, landing pages, and email assets to CRM platforms (Salesforce or HubSpot preferred)
* Familiarity with marketing automation platforms and how they connect to web and email touchpoints
* Understanding of UTM tracking, Google Analytics (GA4\\), and conversion pixel implementation
* Demonstrated ability to independently design and build digital assets (emails and landing pages) — strong visual sensibility with working knowledge of UX/UI principles and design tools (Figma or equivalent)
* Strong attention to detail and a quality\\-first approach to testing and QA
* Portfolio demonstrating HTML email work, landing pages, and digital marketing assets


**Desirable**
* Experience with email rendering QA tools (Litmus or Email on Acid); hands\\-on familiarity with Stripo and Landingi is a strong plus
* Hands\\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, HubSpot, or Mailchimp
* Familiarity with CMS platforms (WordPress or similar)
* Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG 2\\.1\\)
* Experience working alongside or managing relationships with external web agencies
* Exposure to international or multicultural digital marketing environments


*The post holder may be asked to undertake additional duties in line with business requirements. All employees are expected to uphold Quallege’s values and comply with company policies, including those related to equality, diversity, inclusion, and safeguarding.*
**Other Information**
 Please note this position is only available on our consultancy agreement.
   

  

 Global University Systems equal opportunity employer. We provide equal opportunities and are committed to the principle of equality regardless of race, ancestry, place of origin, colour, ethnic origin, citizenship, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, record of offences, marital status, family status or disability. The post holder may be asked to undertake different or additional duties in line with business requirements at the request of their line manager. There is an expectation that all employees will maintain the values of the Group and will comply with the code of conduct as well as equality and diversity, health and safety and safeguarding policies

More than 7,000 organizations and 100 million\\+ users in 180\\+ countries and in nearly 50 languages use Cornerstone Galaxy to build high\\-performing, future\\-ready organizations and people today.

title: Senior Engineering Manager, Geo
description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 8 years of experience with software development.
* 7 years of experience leading technical project strategy, ML design, and optimizing ML infrastructure (e.g., model deployment, model evaluation, data processing, debugging, fine tuning).
* 5 years of experience with one or more of the following: Speech/audio (e.g., technology duplicating and responding to the human voice), reinforcement learning (e.g., sequential decision making), ML infrastructure, or specialization in another ML field.
* 5 years of experience in a people management or team leadership role.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master’s degree or PhD in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field.
* 5 years of experience working in a complex, cross\\-functional organization.


**About The Job**
 Like Google's own ambitions, the work of a Software Engineer goes beyond just Search. Software Engineering Managers have not only the technical expertise to take on and provide technical leadership to major projects, but also manage a team of Engineers. You not only optimize your own code but make sure Engineers are able to optimize theirs. As a Software Engineering Manager you manage your project goals, contribute to product strategy and help develop your team. Teams work all across the company, in areas such as information retrieval, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, distributed computing, large\\-scale system design, networking, security, data compression, user interface design; the list goes on and is growing every day. Operating with scale and speed, our exceptional software engineers are just getting started \\-\\- and as a manager, you guide the way.
   

  

 With technical and leadership expertise, you manage engineers across multiple teams and locations, a large product budget and oversee the deployment of large\\-scale projects across multiple sites internationally.
   

  

 The Geo team's mission is to empower people to help each other everywhere as they navigate, explore, and get things done in the world. However, user generated content (UGC) comes with big risks to content trust due to abuse as well as data quality challenges.The goal of this team is to help well intentioned merchants and UGC contributors be successful in sharing their knowledge on Google Maps.
   

  

 The Geo team is focused on building the most accurate, comprehensive, and useful maps for our users, through products like Maps, Earth, Street View, Google Maps Platform, and more. Every month, more than a billion people rely on Maps services to explore the world and navigate their daily lives.
   

  

 The Geo team also enables developers to use the power of Google Maps platforms to enhance their apps and websites. As they plot a course for the future of mapping, they are solving complex computer science problems, designing beautiful and intuitive product experiences, and improving our understanding of the real world.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Set and communicate team priorities that support the broader organization's goals. Align strategy, processes, and decision\\-making across teams.
* Set clear expectations with individuals based on their level and role and aligned to the broader organization's goals. Meet regularly with individuals to discuss performance and development and provide feedback and coaching.
* Develop the long\\-term technical goal and roadmap within, and often beyond, the scope of your teams. Evolve the roadmap to meet anticipated future requirements and infrastructure needs.
* Oversee systems designs within the scope of the broader area, and review product or system development code to solve ambiguous problems.
* Drive technical project strategy, lead large\\-scale ML infrastructure optimization, and oversee the design and implementation of solutions across multiple specialized ML areas.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

 You will bridge the gap between product requirements and machine learning, developing models that ensure every user interaction is met with a relevant, intent\\-aware experience. You will apply modern NLP, Information Retrieval (IR), and multimodal methods—including adapting LLMs and SLMs—to deliver these solutions at a global scale.

As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

This expectation is subject to local law and may vary by jurisdiction.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Query Intelligence: Architect and refine large\\-scale classification and orchestration systems that map complex natural language queries to specific segments (e.g., Health, Sports, or Travel).
* End\\-to\\-End Ownership: Turn product requirements into testable hypotheses, define success metrics, and ship ML solutions that move customer and business KPIs.
* Generative AI Innovation: Leverage cutting\\-edge NLP and Generative AI (RAG, fine\\-tuning, prompt engineering) to balance high precision with seamless integration across multiple search verticals.

**Qualifications**
**Required Qualifications:**
* Bachelor's Degree in Statistics, Econometrics, Computer Science, Electrical or Computer Engineering, or related field AND 2\\+ years related experience (e.g., statistics, predictive analytics, research).
+ OR Master's Degree in Statistics, Econometrics, Computer Science, Electrical or Computer Engineering, or related field AND 1\\+ year(s) related experience (e.g., statistics, predictive analytics, research).
+ OR Doctorate in Statistics, Econometrics, Computer Science, Electrical or Computer Engineering, or related field.
+ OR equivalent experience.

* NLP \\& Generative AI: Practical experience building and deploying NLP or LLM\\-based solutions (e.g., prompt engineering, fine\\-tuning, or RAG) within production services.
* Experimentation: Solid foundation in statistical modeling and experience designing experiments to validate model performance.
* Data Systems: Proficiency in SQL and experience working with large\\-scale data processing systems (e.g., Spark, Azure Databricks, or Kusto).


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Domain Expertise: Experience in search query understanding, recommendation engines, or large\\-scale classification.
* Advanced Modeling: Exposure to multimodal modeling or advanced retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) techniques.
* Impactful Shipping: A track record of shipping ML features that have directly moved business KPIs in consumer\\-facing products.
* Communication: Ability to translate complex technical findings into actionable insights for stakeholders and senior leadership.

The company delivers integrated solutions across design, engineering, manufacturing, and installation, serving diverse industrial and infrastructure sectors. With a strong operational and manufacturing footprint across India, EPACK Prefab is committed to quality, innovation, and execution excellence.
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




  





 We are looking for a skilled professional in the Detailing Department to support engineering and project execution teams by preparing accurate and efficient detailing drawings. The role involves coordinating with design, production, and site teams to ensure seamless project delivery. The ideal candidate should have hands\\-on experience in PEB detailing and a strong understanding of structural drawings and standards.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Prepare detailed GA drawings, shop drawings, and fabrication drawings as per project requirements
* Interpret design inputs and convert them into accurate detailing outputs
* Coordinate with design and engineering teams to resolve drawing\\-related queries
* Ensure drawings are aligned with project specifications and industry standards
* Maintain accuracy in BOM (Bill of Materials) and drawing documentation
* Work closely with production and erection teams for smooth execution
* Identify and resolve detailing errors to avoid rework and delays
* Ensure timely submission of drawings as per project schedules
* Maintain proper documentation and version control of drawings



  





**Requirement:** 




  




* 5–6 years of experience in detailing, preferably in PEB / steel structures
* Proficiency in detailing software such as Tekla, AutoCAD, or similar tools
* Strong understanding of structural drawings, fabrication processes, and standards
* Ability to read and interpret engineering designs accurately
* Good coordination and communication skills
* Attention to detail and problem\\-solving ability
* Ability to work under deadlines and manage multiple projects



  





**How to Apply:** 




  





 Interested candidates can share their updated profile at:
 **pebhr3@epack.in / pebhr8@epack.in**

title: Senior Technical Specialist
description:
**Job Description**
 At NI IP Routing SW, we believe in fostering a flat and non\\-hierarchical work environment. We are obsessed about delivering high\\-quality products and ensure the utmost level of excellence in everything we do. We are a passionate bunch and strive to be technological leaders in our industry. You will be integral to a close\\-knit team to engineer best\\-in\\-class products for the most critical networks – data centers for web/hyper\\-scalers, telcos and enterprises (including AI fabrics), and communication service provider networks.
   

  

 We are looking for SW engineers who wish to be a part of developing and evolving the current and next generation of routers that form the core of anything internet. These routers are at the heart of Nokia’s IP product offerings, from data centers and content distribution, carrying mobile backhaul traffic, to providing strong, resilient low latency and dependable IP core for communication and cloud service providers. In this role, you will have the opportunity to work with one of the best engineering teams in the industry. We value your expertise and offer an environment where you can thrive both professionally and personally. There are more customers we want to win, more networks to penetrate, more technologies to enable and more applications to support. We want to make smaller products, and we want to make bigger products. We want to build products based on newer standards and newer ASICS in the market.
   

  

 You will play a critical role in designing and implementing high\\-performance data path solutions on both custom and merchant silicon. You will be responsible for writing efficient and modular code that is well\\-tested and robust, ensuring that it meets the high standards required for the most critical networks. Your role will involve working on advanced packet forwarding techniques in IP, MPLS, Segment Routing, VxLANs. You will also contribute into Traffic Management technologies \\- QoS (Policers, Schedulers, Shapers), ACLs, TCAM Management, and Packet Extractions to CPU. DCN2026\\.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Design and implementation: You will gain deep expertise in designing and implementing datapath solutions on both custom and merchant silicon.
* Advanced packet forwarding: Develop your skills in IP, MPLS, Segment Routing, VXLANs, and QoS technologies such as Policers, Schedulers, and ACLs. DPDK and performance optimization: You'll be working with DPDK and similar technologies to maximize performance for high\\-throughput systems.
* Virtualized environments: Expand your knowledge in working with virtualized Linux environments such as KVM and Docker.
* Team collaboration: Work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including product management and software testers, to deliver customer\\-driven solutions.
* Robust and modular code: Focus on writing modular, maintainable code that is well unit\\-tested, improving your coding skills and best practices.


**Key Skills And Experience**
**You have:**
* Bachelor's degree with 3\\-10 years of Experience.
* Proven experience in packet forwarding technologies (IP, MPLS, Segment Routing, VXLANs).
* Experience with QoS technologies (Policers, Schedulers, ACLs) and TCAM management.
* Hands\\-on experience with DPDK for high\\-performance packet processing.
* Proficiency in C/C\\+\\+ programming, with a focus on networking solutions.
* Methodical problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.


**It would be nice if you also had:**
* Experience working in virtualized Linux environments (e.g., KVM, Docker, etc.).
* Passion for networking technologies and high\\-performance systems.


**About Us**
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**
 Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Nokia .
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
 We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.
   

  

 If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.
   

  

 The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .
   

  

**About The Team**
 Some of our benefits:
   

  

* Flexible and hybrid working schemes
* A minimum of 90 days of Maternity and Paternity Leave, with the option to return to work within a year following the birth or adoption of a child (based on eligibility)
* Life insurance to all employees to provide peace of mind and financial security
* Well\\-being programs to support your mental and physical health
* Opportunities to join and receive support from Nokia Employee Resource Groups (NERGs)
* Employee Growth Solutions to support your personalized career \\& skills development
* Diverse pool of Coaches \\& Mentors to whom you have easy access
* A learning environment which promotes personal growth and professional development \\- for your role and beyond

 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \\& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\\-first model which brings together the best of in\\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \\#VOIS \\#BeUnrivalled \\#CreateTheFuture

 We are seeking a skilled Camunda Developer to contribute to the full Software Development Life Cycle, from requirements elicitation through to architecture, design, and delivery. The individual will work closely with stakeholders to build scalable process‑automation solutions using the Camunda Engine, BPMN, and microservices. This role includes supporting a strategically important greenfield programme, establishing development best practices, and contributing to the creation of frameworks that will shape future delivery within the CISE function.

 Define technical architecture, produce high‑level design artefacts, and shape technology approaches and processes.

**Who You Are**
 Experienced in Camunda Engine, BPMN, SOA, and microservice architecture.
   

  

 Proficient in Java development with strong understanding of design patterns relevant to microservices.
   

  

 Knowledgeable in event‑driven design and messaging platforms, ideally Kafka.
   

  

 Skilled in Spring and Spring Boot, with awareness of CI/CD principles and tools.

 Demonstrates strong analytical capabilities, effective communication skills, and a collaborative approach to problem‑solving.

You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
 Opportunity to work on a strategic greenfield project with high organisational visibility.
   

  

 Exposure to modern automation technologies and enterprise‑scale architectural decision‑making.
   

  

 Opportunities to mentor others, shape best practices, and influence technical direction.
   

  

 A collaborative environment that values innovation and continuous improvement.
   

  

**What Skills You Will Learn**
 Advanced expertise in Camunda, BPMN, and large‑scale process‑automation frameworks.
   

  

 Deeper proficiency in microservices, event‑driven architecture, and enterprise integration patterns.
   

  

 Capability‑building in technical leadership, design advisory, and architectural decision‑making.
   

  

 Enhanced collaboration, coaching, and cross‑functional project delivery skills.
   

  

**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future — a more connected, inclusive, and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.

title: Senior Technical Documentation Engineer
description:
Harness is the AI Software Delivery Platform company, led by technologist and entrepreneur Jyoti Bansal (founder of AppDynamics, acquired by Cisco for $3\\.7B). Harness has raised approximately $570M in funding and is valued at $5\\.5B, backed by leading investors including Goldman Sachs, Menlo Ventures, IVP, Unusual Ventures, Citi Ventures, and more. As AI accelerates code creation, the real bottleneck has shifted to everything after the code – testing, deployments, application security, reliability, compliance, and cost optimization. Harness brings AI and automation to this “outer loop,” helping teams ship software faster while maintaining security and governance throughout the entire software delivery lifecycle.
   

  

 Powered by Harness AI and the Software Delivery Knowledge Graph, the Harness Platform applies deep context and intelligent automation across the software delivery lifecycle with governance and policy\\-driven controls embedded throughout the platform.
   

  

 Over the past year, Harness powered over 185M deployments, 82M builds, 18T flag evaluations, 8M security scans, 9\\.1B optimized tests, 3T protected API calls, and helped manage $2\\.8B in cloud spend — enabling customers like United Airlines, Morningstar, and Choice Hotels to accelerate releases by up to 75%, reduce cloud costs by up to 60%, and achieve 10x DevOps efficiency.
   

  

 With a global team across 14 offices and 25 countries, Harness is shaping the future of AI software delivery — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to help us move even faster.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Harness is building a modern, engineering\\-driven documentation organization to support a fast\\-growing product portfolio and global customer base. We are looking for a
 **Senior Documentation Engineer** 
 who can independently drive high\\-quality documentation across complex feature areas while contributing to the evolution of documentation standards and practices.
   

  

 This role goes beyond writing feature guides. You will own significant documentation areas end\\-to\\-end, partner deeply with engineering and product teams, and help raise the overall quality and maturity of the documentation organization.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
**Own documentation for complex features and modules**
* Lead the full documentation lifecycle for medium\\-to\\-large features or product areas, from discovery and planning through publication and ongoing maintenance.
* Work closely with Product Managers and Engineers to understand technical context, user workflows, edge cases, and intended use cases.
* Ensure documentation reflects not only how features work, but also why they exist and how they fit into broader customer journeys.


**Drive documentation quality and usability**
* Identify gaps, inconsistencies, and usability issues across documentation and proactively drive improvements.
* Improve content structure, flow, prerequisites, examples, and troubleshooting guidance to reduce user friction.
* Apply documentation standards consistently and contribute to refining templates, style guidance, and best practices.


**Work effectively in a docs\\-as\\-code environment**
* Contribute documentation through Git\\-based workflows, including pull requests, branching strategies, and structured reviews.
* Use Markdown and documentation tooling confidently to produce well\\-structured, maintainable content.
* Participate in improving documentation workflows, automation, and review practices that increase quality and efficiency.


**Influence cross\\-functional execution**
* Collaborate closely with Engineering, Product, Support, and DevRel to ensure documentation is accurate, complete, and aligned with customer needs.
* Raise documentation requirements early in the feature lifecycle and help align timelines between product releases and documentation delivery.
* Anticipate areas of confusion or user impact and ask the right questions to clarify scope and behavior.


**Contribute to team and documentation maturity**
* Support and mentor Documentation Engineers through peer reviews, feedback, and sharing of effective practices.
* Help improve team processes by suggesting practical enhancements to workflows, planning approaches, or content organization.
* Share learnings from customer feedback, support trends, and usage patterns to inform documentation improvements.


**Core Qualifications**
**What we are looking for**
* 5–7 years of experience in technical documentation, developer documentation, or product documentation.
* Proven experience in independently owning documentation for complex features or product areas.
* Strong ability to understand technical systems and translate them into clear, structured, and user\\-focused documentation.
* Demonstrated ability to explain both how something works and why it matters in real\\-world use cases.
* Experience working closely with engineers and product managers to gather and validate technical information.
* Strong written communication skills with a focus on clarity, structure, and usability.


**Required Technical Skills**
* Solid experience working in a docs\\-as\\-code environment, including Git\\-based contribution and review workflows.
* Strong working knowledge of Git, version control concepts, and Markdown.
* Comfortable using task tracking systems such as JIRA to manage documentation work and align with product delivery.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in SaaS, cloud, DevOps, developer tools, or security product documentation.
* Experience in improving documentation quality or structure at a team or module level.
* Exposure to documentation analytics, customer feedback loops, or support\\-driven documentation improvements.


**How You Work**
**Customer\\-aware and detail\\-oriented**
 You write with a clear understanding of user goals, common confusion points, and decision\\-making paths. You care deeply about clarity, accuracy, and usability.
   

  

**Independent but collaborative**
 You can drive your work with minimal supervision while staying aligned with peers across product, engineering, and documentation.
   

  

**Growth and impact\\-focused**
 You continuously refine your craft, seek feedback, and look for opportunities to improve both documentation and the way the team works.
   

  

**Harness In The News**
* Accelerating Our Mission to Bring AI to Everything After Code
* Goldman Sachs leads investment in software delivery startup Harness at $5\\.5 billion valuation
* How Harness runs 16 “startups within a startup” at scale \\| Jyoti Bansal
* Harness Research Shows AI Visibility Crisis Fueling Security Nightmare
* Harness has been named to the Inc. Power Partner list for software delivery success


 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex or national origin.
   

  

**Note on Fraudulent Recruiting/Offers**
 We have become aware that there may be fraudulent recruiting attempts being made by people posing as representatives of Harness. These scams may involve fake job postings, unsolicited emails, or messages claiming to be from our recruiters or hiring managers.
   

  

 Please note, we do not ask for sensitive or financial information via chat, text, or social media, and any email communications will come from the domain @harness.io. Additionally, Harness will never ask for any payment, fee to be paid, or purchases to be made by a job applicant. All applicants are encouraged to apply directly to our open jobs via our website. Interviews are generally conducted via Zoom video conference unless the candidate requests other accommodations.
   

  

 If you believe that you have been the target of an interview/offer scam by someone posing as a representative of Harness, please do not provide any personal or financial information and contact us immediately at security@harness.io. You can also find additional information about this type of scam and report any fraudulent employment offers via the Federal Trade Commission’s website (https://consumer.ftc.gov/articles/job\\-scams), or you can contact your local law enforcement agency.

title: INTEGRATION PLATFORM SPECIALIST - VOIS
description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \\& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\\-first model which brings together the best of in\\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \\#VOIS \\#BeUnrivalled \\#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking an Integration Platform Specialist to work in a client\\-facing capacity, supporting and managing multi\\-tier, clustered Oracle Fusion Middleware applications hosted on UNIX platforms. This role focuses on ensuring high availability, stability, scalability, and performance of integration platforms such as WebLogic, OSB, SOA/AIA and ODI, while adhering to ITIL practices. The individual will play a key role in deployments, troubleshooting, capacity planning, and continuous service improvement within a complex, highly concurrent telecom environment.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 Manage end\\-to\\-end application deployments in clustered non\\-production and production environments using CI/CD tools such as Jenkins.Ensure platform scalability, stability, resilience and uptime in a distributed, high\\-throughput environment.Perform deployment, configuration, maintenance and troubleshooting of WebLogic and Fusion Middleware applications including OSB, SOA/AIA and ODI.Analyse end\\-to\\-end transaction flows, identify issues, and collaborate with development teams to resolve defects effectively.Provide clear, structured technical assessments and root cause analysis for incidents and problems.Maintain server logs and perform proactive monitoring to identify performance bottlenecks.Participate in incident, problem, change, release and deployment management activities in line with ITIL processes.Develop and maintain technical documentation including SOPs, run books, deployment plans and work instructions.Support capacity planning activities by maintaining risk registers, defining KPIs, and proactively optimising infrastructure utilisation.Coordinate with cross\\-functional teams and business stakeholders to resolve issues within agreed SLAs.Provide on\\-call and rotational shift support, including weekends and public holidays, as required.Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality, reduce costs and improve operational efficiency.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 An experienced integration or middleware professional with 2\\-3 years of hands\\-on experience in application deployment and support across WebLogic, OSB, SOA/AIA and ODI environments.Proficient in UNIX commands and shell scripting, with working knowledge of Java, SQL and PL/SQL.Experienced in performance tuning, transaction triage, load balancing and high\\-availability architectures.Knowledgeable in JDBC, JMS, Node Manager, clustering and lifecycle management of WebLogic Server.Familiar with BPEL, Mediator, Proxy Services, XREF tables, DVMs, XSLT and XQuery transformations.Experienced in certificate installation and renewal within WebLogic environments.Exposure to CI/CD and DevOps tools such as Bitbucket, Jenkins and SonarQube.Comfortable working with web servers such as Oracle HTTP Server (OHS).Possess working knowledge of Oracle Database administration activities using SQL\\*Plus, including listener checks and basic troubleshooting.Strong understanding of ITIL processes with hands\\-on experience using ticketing tools such as Remedy or Jira.Familiar with telecom domain environments and Fusion Middleware paired applications such as OSM, Siebel and BRM within RODOD implementations.A collaborative communicator who can work effectively under pressure in a fast\\-paced, team\\-oriented environment.
   

  

**Not a Perfect Fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What’s In It For You**
 Opportunity to work on large\\-scale, business\\-critical integration platforms within a global telecom environment.
   

  

 Exposure to complex, high\\-availability systems and modern DevOps practices.
   

  

 A collaborative, inclusive workplace that values continuous improvement and learning.
   

  

 The ability to influence platform stability, performance and transformation initiatives that directly impact business outcomes.
   

  

**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced capacity planning and performance optimisation techniques for enterprise middleware platforms.
* Deeper expertise in CI/CD implementation and DevOps integration within Oracle Fusion Middleware ecosystems.
* Enhanced incident, problem and change management capabilities aligned to ITIL best practices.
* Broader understanding of end\\-to\\-end telecom integration landscapes and business processes.


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can be truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
